generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO cybersecurity advisor, I've seen firsthand how strategic autonomy isn't just about defense—it's about protecting our civil liberties. When we rely too much on foreign tech, we invite vulnerabilities that put our privacy at risk. The recent data breaches in allied systems prove this isn't theoretical. We need domestic solutions to control our own security destiny. #DigitalSovereignty #NationalSecurityFirst
